offer: For Shopify store owners processing 10–50 orders/month, inaccurate inventory levels cause stockouts and overstock. We provide an inventory forecasting system instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate inventory levels leading to stockouts and overstock.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Shopify store owners
Indie Hackers posts discussing inventory management
DM outreach to Shopify store owners with demo video
Community forums sharing tools for inventory tracking
try_it: Let users try Basic demand prediction and Stock level alerts on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
